creator: inyaoo@gmail.com
text:
It seems to break pngpriv.h users, e.g. graphics/optipng.

--- png15.diff begins here ---
diff --git graphics/pngMakefile graphics/pngMakefile
index 87cd90c..0e06a29 100644
--- graphics/pngMakefile
+++ graphics/pngMakefile
@@ -66,7 +66,9 @@ pre-su-install:
 	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/libdata/pkgconfig
 
 post-install:
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/pngpriv.h ${PREFIX}/include/libpng15/
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/pngdebug.h ${WRKSRC}/pnginfo.h \
+		${WRKSRC}/pngpriv.h ${WRKSRC}/pngstruct.h \
+		${PREFIX}/include/libpng15/
 	${RMDIR} ${PREFIX}/include/libpng
 	${RM} ${PREFIX}/libdata/pkgconfig/libpng.pc
 	${LN} -sf libpng15.pc ${PREFIX}/libdata/pkgconfig/libpng.pc
diff --git graphics/pngpkg-plist graphics/pngpkg-plist
index e0be85d..9bc30bd 100644
--- graphics/pngpkg-plist
+++ graphics/pngpkg-plist
@@ -2,8 +2,11 @@ bin/libpng-config
 bin/libpng15-config
 include/libpng15/png.h
 include/libpng15/pngconf.h
+include/libpng15/pngdebug.h
+include/libpng15/pnginfo.h
 include/libpng15/pnglibconf.h
 include/libpng15/pngpriv.h
+include/libpng15/pngstruct.h
 include/png.h
 include/pngconf.h
 include/pnglibconf.h
--- png15.diff ends here ---

--- optipng065-patch-zzz-png15.diff begins here ---
--- configure~
+++ configure
@@ -180,7 +180,7 @@ else
     test=conftest$$
 cat > $test.c <<EOM
 #include <png.h>
-#if PNG_LIBPNG_VER < 10209 || PNG_LIBPNG_VER >= 10500
+#if PNG_LIBPNG_VER < 10209
 #error This program requires libpng version 1.2.9 or higher, or version 1.4.x
 #endif
 int dummy;
--- lib/pngxtern/pngx.h~
+++ lib/pngxtern/pngx.h
@@ -13,6 +13,9 @@
 #define PNGX_H
 
 #include "png.h"
+#if PNG_LIBPNG_VER >= 10500
+#include "libpng15/pngpriv.h"
+#endif
 
 
 /* PNGX_ASSERT and PNGX_ASSERT_MSG:
--- lib/pngxtern/pngxtern.h~
+++ lib/pngxtern/pngxtern.h
@@ -46,9 +46,9 @@ extern "C" {
  * This function requires io_ptr to be a fseek-able FILE*.
  * It does not work with generic I/O routines.
  */
-extern PNG_EXPORT(int, pngx_read_image)
+PNG_EXPORT(1, int, pngx_read_image,
    PNGARG((png_structp png_ptr, png_infop info_ptr,
-           png_const_charpp fmt_name, png_const_charpp fmt_description));
+           png_const_charpp fmt_name, png_const_charpp fmt_description)));
 
 /*
  * Private format decoding helpers.
--- src/opngreduc.c~
+++ src/opngreduc.c
@@ -24,7 +24,9 @@
 #include "png.h"
 #include "opngreduc.h"
 
-#if PNG_LIBPNG_VER >= 10400
+#if PNG_LIBPNG_VER >= 10500
+#include "libpng15/pngpriv.h"
+#elif PNG_LIBPNG_VER >= 10400
 #include "libpng/pngpriv.h"
 #endif
 
--- optipng065-patch-zzz-png15.diff ends here ---
